title: ory/hydra startup results in: container state improper
body:
### Issue Description

Running the following command results in issue:
```
podman-compose -f quickstart.yml \
    up --build
```

```
...
time=2024-04-30T09:04:37Z level=info msg=> jwk_index applied successfully audience=application migration_file=migrations/20240104181300000001_jwk_index.up.sql migration_name=jwk_index service_name=Ory Hydra service_version=v2.2.0 version=20240104181300000001
time=2024-04-30T09:04:37Z level=info msg=Migration has not yet been applied, running migration. audience=application migration_file=migrations/20240129174410000001_client_add_logout_skip_consent_column.up.sql migration_name=client_add_logout_skip_consent_column service_name=Ory Hydra service_version=v2.2.0 version=20240129174410000001
time=2024-04-30T09:04:37Z level=info msg=> client_add_logout_skip_consent_column applied successfully audience=application migration_file=migrations/20240129174410000001_client_add_logout_skip_consent_column.up.sql migration_name=client_add_logout_skip_consent_column service_name=Ory Hydra service_version=v2.2.0 version=20240129174410000001
Successfully applied migrations!
exit code: 0
podman start -a hydra_consent_1
podman start -a hydra_hydra_1
Error: unable to start container f7b2287d311ae1fb5b862677e516db97882155759d2e1de5460f4413f1141e7a: preparing container f7b2287d311ae1fb5b862677e516db97882155759d2e1de5460f4413f1141e7a for attach: some dependencies of container f7b2287d311ae1fb5b862677e516db97882155759d2e1de5460f4413f1141e7a are not started: 8dd985a8744ef07c42e77689c9e83ca9fbe0cdc8d2f641f860ed4b43a8e4a975: container state improper
exit code: 125

> hydra-login-consent-logout@0.0.0 serve /usr/src/app
> node lib/app.js

Listening on http://0.0.0.0:3000
```

where the message of my interest is: 
```
container state improper
exit code: 125
```


### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. create new podman machine using commands:
```
podman machine reset --force
podman system connection rm podman-machine-default-root
podman machine init --cpus=4 --disk-size=60 --memory=8096 -v $HOME:$HOME
podman machine set --rootful
podman machine start
```
2. clone the ory/hydra repo:
```
git clone https://github.com/ory/hydra.git
```
3. run podman-compose on the cloned repo: 
```
cd hydra

``` 


### Describe the results you received

Describe the results you received

### Describe the results you expected

hydra container started successfully

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Privileged

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body:
We do not support podman-compose directly, you may want to head over to https://github.com/containers/podman-compose/ if you have issues with podman-compose.

Otherwise please provide a reproducer with just the podman commands.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
